朝九晚五 https://9to5mac.com/ Apple 新闻和 Mac 谣言全天爆发2026 年 3 月 19 日星期四 01:33:37 +0000 en-US每小时1 https://wordpress.org/?v=6.9.4 https://9to5mac.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2019/10/cropped-cropped-mac1-1.png?w=32朝九晚五https://9to5mac.com/ 32 32 146091842 巴西竞争监管机构就 iPhone NFC 限制向苹果询问https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/brazils-competition-watchdog-inquires-apple-over-iphone-nfc-restrictions/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/brazils-competition-watchdog-inquires-apple-over-iphone-nfc-restrictions/#respondMarcus Mendes Thu, 19 Mar 2026 01:33:37 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044156

苹果必须在本月底之前对巴西竞争监管机构 CADE 就与 iPhone NFC 相关的反竞争规则提出的一系列技术和法律问题做出回应。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/liquid-glass-and-long-standing-bugs-push-apples-grades-down-in-visual-accessibility-report-card/feed/ 1 1044141 Overcast 正在获得成绩单，它将比 Apple 播客更具优势https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/overcast-is-gaining-transcripts-and-it-will-have-an-edge-over-apple-podcasts/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/overcast-is-gaining-transcripts-and-it-will-have-an-edge-over-apple-podcasts/#commentsZac Hall Wed, 18 Mar 2026 21:05:10 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044138

iOS 版第三方播客播放器 Overcast 很快将包含播客剧集的文字记录。当该功能推出时，它将比苹果播客应用程序中的版本具有优势。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/overcast-is-gaining-transcripts-and-it-will-have-an-edge-over-apple-podcasts/feed/ 1 1044138 watchOS 26.4 修复了 Apple Watch Workout 应用程序的一个主要问题https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/watchos-26-4-fixes-a-major-apple-watch-workout-app-complaint/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/watchos-26-4-fixes-a-major-apple-watch-workout-app-complaint/#commentsZac Hall Wed, 18 Mar 2026 20:00:28 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044098

苹果在 watchOS 26 中重新设计了 Workout 应用，但并非所有人都喜欢新的 Apple Watch 运动追踪体验。事实证明，苹果一直在倾听，因为 watchOS 26.4 解决了人们对新设计的主要抱怨。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/watchos-26-4-fixes-a-major-apple-watch-workout-app-complaint/feed/ 5 1044098 苹果在人工智能诉讼中被点名，称其数据集不支持苹果智能https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-named-in-ai-lawsuit-over-data-set-it-already-says-doesnt-power-apple-intelligence/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-named-in-ai-lawsuit-over-data-set-it-already-says-doesnt-power-apple-intelligence/#commentsZac Hall Wed, 18 Mar 2026 19:48:54 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044122

据路透社报道，出版商《心灵鸡汤》提起的新人工智能诉讼中点名苹果公司。然而，诉讼指向苹果已经表示不支持苹果情报的数据集。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/apple-named-in-ai-lawsuit-over-data-set-it-already-says-doesnt-power-apple-intelligence/feed/ 1 1044122 iOS 26.4 终于让家庭共享成员使用自己的付款方式https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-to-finally-let-family-sharing-members-use-their-own- payment-methods/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-to-finally-let-family-sharing-members-use-their-own- payment-methods/#commentsMarcus Mendes Wed, 18 Mar 2026 19:48:02 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044126

随着今天早些时候发布的 iOS 26.4 RC，苹果解决了家庭共享长期存在的限制之一。这是新内容。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-to-finally-let-family-sharing-members-use-their-own- payment-methods/feed/ 3 1044126 macOS 26.4 发行说明：Apple 详细介绍了 Mac 的六项新功能https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/macos-26-4-release-notes-apple-details-6-new-features-for-mac/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/macos-26-4-release-notes-apple-details-6-new-features-for-mac/#commentsChance Miller Wed, 18 Mar 2026 19:23:56 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044107

除了iOS 26.4 RC之外，Apple 今天还向开发者和公共 Beta 测试人员发布了 macOS 26.4 RC 。此次更新为 Mac 用户带来了六项变化，苹果今天在其发行说明中首次确认了所有这些变化。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/macos-26-4-release-notes-apple-details-6-new-features-for-mac/feed/ 5 1044107 iOS 26.4 发布日期：iPhone 新功能即将推出https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-release-date-heres-when-new-iphone-features-are-coming/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-release-date-heres-when-new-iphone-features-are-coming/#commentsRyan Christoffel Wed, 18 Mar 2026 18:45:00 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1040528

iOS 26.4 是一次重大更新，在 Apple Music、播客、CarPlay 等领域引入了大量新功能。这是预计其公开发布的时间。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-release-date-heres-when-new-iphone-features-are-coming/feed/ 2 1040528 iOS 26.4 修复了 iPhone 键盘准确性，具体方法如下https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-fixes-iphone-keyboard/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-fixes-iphone-keyboard/#commentsChance Miller Wed, 18 Mar 2026 18:25:09 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044091

苹果今天向开发者和公共 Beta 测试者发布了iOS 26.4 RC，为最快本月晚些时候正式发布奠定了基础。

苹果还分享了 iOS 26.4 的官方发行说明，确认该更新提高了在 iPhone 上快速打字时的键盘准确性。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/18/ios-26-4-fixes-iphone-keyboard/feed/ 8 1044091
